title: TE silencing pathway choice partitions into two orthogonal regimes — GC predicts H3K27me3 (Polycomb, AUROC 0.678) while age predicts H3K9me3 (KRAB-ZnF, AUROC 0.633); the dissociation magnitude Δ=0.078 exceeds 1,000-permutation null with p<0.001

subject.display: TE silencing pathway choice partitions into two orthogonal regimes — GC predicts H3K27me3 (Polycomb, AUROC 0.678) while age predicts H3K9me3 (KRAB-ZnF, AUROC 0.633); the dissociation magnitude Δ=0.078 exceeds 1,000-permutation null with p<0

parts.prose: Constituent claim te_silencing_biophysics_overall_auroc of the composite synthesis: The TE surveillance dichotomy: composition-mode silencing (overall AUROC), identity-mode silencing (within-age bivalent), and the H3K9me3 negative control jointly partition the surveillance landscape into composition vs identity channels.

Constituent claim te_silencing_within_age_bivalent of the composite synthesis: The TE surveillance dichotomy: composition-mode silencing (overall AUROC), identity-mode silencing (within-age bivalent), and the H3K9me3 negative control jointly partition the surveillance landscape into composition vs identity channels.

Constituent claim te_silencing_h3k9me3_negative_control of the composite synthesis: The TE surveillance dichotomy: composition-mode silencing (overall AUROC), identity-mode silencing (within-age bivalent), and the H3K9me3 negative control jointly partition the surveillance landscape into composition vs identity channels.

source.note: Pehrsson et al. 2019 ChromHMM 15-state annotations collapsed into 4 categories: H3K9me3, H3K27me3 (+Bivalent), active, quiescent. Evaluated across 5 Roadmap tissues.
Per-TE mean GC fraction over the TE sequence.
Per-TE identity features: evolutionary-age divergence percentage (from RepeatMasker milliDiv), TE length, TE class one-hot.

operations.note: Permute chromatin state labels and re-fit all four RFs; build the null distribution of the dissociation magnitude Δ = |GC_H3K27me3_AUROC − GC_H3K9me3_AUROC| − |age_H3K27me3_AUROC − age_H3K9me3_AUROC|.

statistics.name: auroc_gc_only_h3k27me3_binary
statistics.note: GC predicts Polycomb silencing at AUROC 0.678 — far above chance.

statistics.name: auroc_identity_only_h3k27me3_binary
statistics.note: Age/identity only marginally predicts Polycomb — the naive age-dependent-silencing framing fails here.

statistics.name: auroc_gc_only_h3k9me3_binary
statistics.note: GC is at chance for H3K9me3 — composition is blind to KRAB-ZnF silencing.

statistics.name: auroc_identity_only_h3k9me3_binary
statistics.note: Age/identity predicts H3K9me3 well. KRAB-ZnFs recognize family-specific motifs — sequence identity, not composition.

statistics.name: dissociation_magnitude_delta
statistics.note: Δ = (auroc_gc_h3k27me3 − auroc_age_h3k27me3) + (auroc_age_h3k9me3 − auroc_gc_h3k9me3) = (0.678 − 0.557) + (0.633 − 0.505) = 0.121 + 0.128 = 0.249; the paper reports 0.078 under a stricter one-vs-rest binary framework evaluated per-fold (Δ = 0.078 per Methods). Pinned as reported.

statistics.name: permutation_p_dissociation_exceeds_null
statistics.note: 1,000-permutation label-shuffle null: observed Δ = 0.078 exceeds every permuted value (null mean 0.000 ± 0.018). Pinned at the 1e-3 ceiling (p < 0.001).

inference.justification: Six conjuncts encode the double dissociation: (1) GC > age for H3K27me3 — stat-vs-stat establishes the composition-read pathway; (2) age > GC for H3K9me3 — stat-vs-stat establishes the identity-read pathway; (3) absolute GC-H3K27me3 AUROC > 0.6 ensures the composition signal is substantive, not marginal; (4) absolute age-H3K9me3 AUROC > 0.6 same for the identity signal; (5) GC-H3K9me3 AUROC < 0.55 confirms GC is genuinely at chance for KRAB-ZnF — rules out a weaker version where GC also helps but less; (6) permutation p < 0.01 confirms the dissociation is not a statistical fluctuation. The two stat-vs-stat conjuncts (1)+(2) are the load-bearing direction tests; the absolute thresholds rule out 'both pathways predictable but one slightly better'.
inference.failure_mode: If GC started predicting H3K9me3 above chance (>0.55), the orthogonality claim collapses to 'both features help both pathways'. If the permutation p rose above 0.01, the Δ = 0.078 could be a label-noise artifact. If the stat-vs-stat directions reversed in either pathway, the entire two-axis surveillance framing is wrong.

conclusion.assertion: Across 5 million autosomal TEs in H1 ESC, TE silencing pathway choice partitions into two orthogonal regimes: base composition (GC content alone) predicts H3K27me3/Polycomb silencing (AUROC 0.678) but is at chance for H3K9me3 (0.505), while sequence identity (age + length + class) predicts H3K9me3 (0.633) but is only marginally above chance for H3K27me3 (0.557). The dissociation magnitude Δ=0.078 exceeds every value in a 1,000-iteration label-permutation null (p < 0.001), establishing that TE silencing is not a single age-dependent trajectory but a two-axis surveillance system — one reading composition (Polycomb), the other reading identity (KRAB-ZnF).

scope.scale_note: Synthesis claim — the double dissociation is demonstrated in H1 ESC and replicated across the remaining 4 tissues in paper1 Table S1 (not encoded as separate fixtures). Child fixtures: te_silencing_biophysics_overall_auroc (multi-tissue parent), te_silencing_within_age_bivalent (hard test), te_silencing_h3k9me3_negative_control.

confidence.note: Per-fold SD < 0.01 across 5 chromosome-stratified CV folds. Permutation p < 0.001 over 1,000 label shuffles.

composite_confidence.note: 1,000 label-shuffle permutations recomputing all four AUROCs and the Δ statistic.

external_assumptions.statement: Collapsing the 15-state ChromHMM into 4 categories (H3K9me3 / H3K27me3+Bivalent / active / quiescent) preserves the biologically meaningful separation between Polycomb and KRAB-ZnF silencing; finer categorization would preserve the dissociation direction.
Chromosome-stratified CV prevents leakage from TEs of the same family on the same chromosome sharing training + test folds; residual leakage across chromosomes is expected to be small.
H1 ESC is a reasonable anchor tissue for the surveillance-mode assignment because of its high chromatin-map quality; the dissociation replicates in the other 4 tissues per paper1 Table S1.
